zh.Savona, Genova, Liguria, Italy: 義大利利古里亞吉諾瓦薩沃納
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelisa de Savona於大約1039年出生在義大利利古里亞吉諾瓦薩沃納時，她的父親Manfredo Tetone di Savona26歲，母親Osule of Leicestershire24歲。她和Robert de Tosny de Stafford至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1118年4月16日在英國萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾波泰斯福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelisa de Savona于大约1039年出生在意大利利古里亞吉諾瓦薩沃納时，她的父亲Manfredo Tetone di Savona26岁，母亲Osule of Leicestershire24岁。她和Robert de Tosny de Stafford至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1118年4月16日在英国萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易享年80岁，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾波泰斯福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Savona
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Giuseppe, Luigi, Marco, Antonio, Francesca, Gaspare, Gasper, Gerardo, Natale, Nicasio.
Italian (southern): habitational name from the city of Savona in Liguria.

nameMeanings.name: Adelisa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Adeline  , which has enjoyed some favour in the English-speaking world. It was famously borne by the Spanish-born opera singer  Adelina Pattie  (  1843–1919 ).

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelisa de Savona was born about 1039, in Savona, Genova, Liguria, Italy, her father, Manfredo Tetone di Savona, was 26 and her mother, Osule of Leicestershire, was 24. She had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Robert de Tosny de Stafford. She died on 16 April 1118, in Belvoir, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 80, and was buried in Bottesford, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelisa de Savona est née environ 1039, à Savona, Genova, Liguria, Italie, son père, Manfredo Tetone di Savona, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Osule of Leicestershire, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Robert de Tosny de Stafford. Elle est décédée le 16 avril 1118, à Belvoir, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Bottesford, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England: Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Adelisa de Savona um 1039 in Savona, Genova, Liguria, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Manfredo Tetone di Savona 26 und ihre Mutter Osule of Leicestershire 24. Sie hatte mit Robert de Tosny de Stafford mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. April 1118 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Belvoir, Leicestershire, England und wurde in Bottesford, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelisa de Savona è nata il circa 1039 nel Savona, Genova, Liguria, Italia, sua padre, Manfredo Tetone di Savona, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Osule of Leicestershire, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Robert de Tosny de Stafford. Morì il 16 aprile 1118, nel Belvoir, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolta a Bottesford, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Savona, Genova, Liguria, Italy: イタリアリグリアジェノヴァサボナ
ja.lifeSummary: Adelisa de Savonaが約1039年にイタリアリグリアジェノヴァサボナで生まれた時，父Manfredo Tetone di Savonaは26歳，母Osule of Leicestershireは24歳であった。彼女はRobert de Tosny de Staffordとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1118年4月16日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルボイルで80歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアボッテスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelisa de Savona(이)가 대략 1039년 이탈리아 리구리아 노바 서아폰아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Manfredo Tetone di Savona(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Osule of Leicestershire(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Robert de Tosny de Stafford(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1118년 4월 16일 영국 레이스스터실르 벨보이르에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 벗츠퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelisa de Savona nasceu aproximadamente 1039, em Savona, Genova, Liguria, Itália, seu pai, Manfredo Tetone di Savona, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Osule of Leicestershire, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Robert de Tosny de Stafford. Ela faleceu em 16 de abril de 1118, em Belvoir, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 80 anos, e foi sepultada em Bottesford, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England: Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelisa de Savona родилась около 1039 г. в местности савона, дженова, лигуря, Италия, её отцу по имени Manfredo Tetone di Savona было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Osule of Leicestershire, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Robert de Tosny de Stafford. Она умерла 16 апреля 1118 г. в местности белвоир, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности боттесфорд, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Robert de Tosny de Stafford. Murió el 16 de abril de 1118, en Belvoir, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultada en Bottesford, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
